name: Mid Columbia Bus Co
officers: unknown (Flatt family historically; sold to Landmark Student Transportation in 2015)
registry_source: Oregon Secretary of State business registry (not directly queried; registration confirmed via SAFER and corporate history)
notes: FMCSA legal/physical address is Pendleton, OR (HQ), but the company operates a Sheridan, OR location at 1017 W Main St per input address. Power units 565 and drivers 427 reflect entire fleet. Originated as Flatt's Trucking Service; entered school bus business in 1956 (Condon SD contract); acquired by Landmark Student Transportation in 2015. MCS-150 filed 01/12/2026. Compliance review safety rating dates back to 1987/2010.

name: Landmark Student Trnsprtn
entity_status: active (operating; majority-owned by CC&L Infrastructure since Jan 2022)
registry_source: Connecticut Secretary of State (portal.ct.gov / business.ct.gov) - not directly returned in search
notes: FMCSA SAFER keyword search for 'LANDMARK STUDENT TRANSPORTATION' returned zero matches; Derby, CT 10 North Ave address appears to be a US administrative/holding office for Landmark Student Transportation Inc (parent HQ at 238 Wellington St E, Aurora, Ontario, Canada; US HQ Dousman, WI). The Landmark group operates ~4,600 buses across owned/managed subsidiaries (no single USDOT). Several unrelated 'Landmark Transport' carriers exist in FMCSA (e.g. USDOT 2230414 in Tracy, CA - DBA ATL - NOT this company). Connecticut operations may be conducted under a subsidiary entity registered separately. Parent acquired by Connor, Clark & Lunn Infrastructure on 2022-01-20.

name: Eastern Bus Co
registry_source: Massachusetts Secretary of the Commonwealth, Corporations Division (corp.sec.state.ma.us)
notes: FMCSA legal/physical address is 1 Durham St, Somerville (corporate HQ); input address 200 Webster St, Newton is a satellite operating location (Yelp confirms Newton Eastern Bus operations at 210 Webster St). Founder Chuck Winitzer started the company in 1997 after running another bus operator since 1981. MCS-150 filed 03/27/2025. MC-1710784 authority active for passenger transport.

name: Community Bus Svc Inc
fmcsa_address: 1 FEDERAL PLAZA W SUITE 908, YOUNGSTOWN, OH 44503
inc_date: 1933 (company founding per company website; SOS filing date not directly retrieved)
registry_source: Ohio Secretary of State business search (businesssearch.ohiosos.gov) - not directly queried; founding year per company sources
notes: FMCSA SAFER record shows Youngstown HQ at 1 Federal Plaza W, Suite 908; input address 1160 Alum Creek Dr, Columbus is a Columbus operating terminal/facility (confirmed via Yelp and company directory). Power units 20 and drivers 27 in FMCSA appear LOW relative to the 264 jobs retained per SBA PPP loan ($2M), suggesting MCS-150 (last filed 10/17/2007) is significantly outdated. Company has operated since 1933 serving school districts and government agencies across Ohio (per com-bus.com). Carrier operates intrastate only.

name: Roberts Hawaii
fmcsa_status: ACTIVE (USDOT) / NOT AUTHORIZED for interstate for-hire
inc_date: 1941 (parent company founded; HI DCCA exact filing date not directly retrieved)
officers: Iwamoto family (founder Robert Iwamoto Sr.); current management at parent Roberts Hawaii Inc.
registry_source: Hawaii DCCA Business Registration Division (Hawaii Business Express - hbe.ehawaii.gov)
notes: FMCSA address matches input exactly (438 Hobron Ln Ste 500, Honolulu). This is the Roberts Hawaii School Bus Inc carrier record (school-bus-specific subsidiary). Parent Roberts Hawaii Tours and Transportation Inc founded 1941 by Robert Iwamoto Sr. as a one-man taxi service in Hanapepe, Kauai. 2013 awarded $21M HI DOE contract for 181 of 305 Oahu bus routes. Reported 4,402,412 miles in 2026; MCS-150 filed 05/07/2026. Out-of-service rate 3.4% (well below 22.26% national average). A separate Roberts Tours & Transportation Inc carrier (USDOT 896559) also exists for charter/tour operations.
